name: Gentle Fresh Scented Mild Moisturising Baby Lotion
long_description:
Our baby lotion contains coconut oil extract, keeps delicate skin soft, smooth and moisturises your baby's skin for up to 24 hours.Our baby lotion contains coconut oil extract, keeps delicate skin soft, smooth and moisturises your baby's skin for up to 24 hours.

- Classic JOHNSON'S baby fresh scent
- CLINICALLY PROVEN MILD
- Dermatologist-tested
- No added parabens, phthalates and dyes

Your baby's delicate skin loses moisture nearly two times faster than yours. JOHNSON'S baby Lotion softens and moisturises your baby's dry skin, and is gentle enough to use morning and night. This CLINICALLY PROVEN MILD formula is gentle enough for a baby's newborn's skin. Our moisturising cream is great as a baby body lotion as well as a moisturiser for a baby's face.

We love babies.

And we understand baby's delicate skin loses moisture faster and more easily throughout the day. Johnson's baby lotion has been improved to slow down moisture-loss by hydrating skin, locking moisture in and dryness out. This clinically-proven long-lasting formula continuously protects baby's skin for up to 24 hours, keeping it feeling healthy and baby soft. Massage Johnson's Baby Lotion on your baby and enjoy skin that's healthy feeling and baby soft, always.

Best for baby. Best for you.

Moms trust Johnson's. Always Mild and Gentle.

  • Tested with Dermatologists

  • Gentle Moisturiser Protects Skin for up to 24 Hours

long_description:
We love babies.

And we understand how important it is for you to protect your baby's soft, delicate skin from irritation and to see your baby looking fresh and happy. That's why we designed Johnson's Baby Pure Cornstarch Powder to protect your baby's skin, and leave it soft and smooth.

Dermatologist tested, this new formula is made out of 99% natural, plant-based cornstarch and has no added dyes, parabens, and phthalates.

With a clean, classic scent, this incredibly soft baby powder glides over your baby's skin to absorb excess moisture - eliminating friction and leaving it feeling delicately soft and dry while providing comfort. This baby powder is suitable for both adults and babies.

Best for baby, best for you.

name: Nappy Rash Ointment
long_description:
Bepanthen Nappy Rash ointment has a unique dual action to help treat and prevent nappy rash whilst providing a soothing relief for your baby. Bepanthen Nappy Rash is specifically formulated for baby's delicate skin. Bepanthen Nappy Rash ointment helps protect against nappy rash and keeps the baby's skin hydrated whilst providing a long lasting breathable waterproof barrier. It also contains Provitamin B5 (dexpanthenol) which helps baby's sensitive skin to heal naturally. If your baby has nappy rash, Bepanthen Nappy Rash's gentle formulation quickly soothes the soreness and aids natural skin healing. Free from all colours, parabens, fragrances or preservatives, so it's the gentle choice to help treat and prevent baby's nappy rash. A clinical study1 has shown that using Bepanthen Nappy Rash to help protect baby's skin at every nappy change leads to a lower incidence of nappy rash.


1. Putet G. et al. Realites Pediatriques 2001; 63:33-38

  • Gentle enough for daily use on baby's delicate skin to help heal and prevent nappy rash.

  • Soothes, actively heals and protects from the delicate baby skin from nappy rash

  • It is free from all colours, parabens, fragrances or preservatives that may irritate baby's skin.

  • Gentle formulation quickly soothes the soreness of nappy rash

  • It contains Provitamin B5 (dexpanthenol) which helps baby's sensitive skin to heal naturally

name: Healing Cream
long_description:
Sudocrem is a zinc-based emollient cream soothes and protects skin by providing a barrier between the skin and substances known to cause irritation such as all forms of moisture but specifically urine and faeces which contain irritating chemicals.

Nappy rash is linked to wet or infrequently changed nappies, diarrhoea, new foods and antibiotics. The main symptom is a red rash on the buttocks. In severe cases, symptoms such as fever and widespread rash can occur.

Sudocrem are proud to support Ronald Mc Donald House Charities Adopt-a-room VIC/TAS, providing vital care for families with seriously ill children.

Bepanthen Nappy Rash ointment has a unique dual action to help treat and prevent nappy rash whilst providing a soothing relief for your baby. Bepanthen Nappy Rash is specifically formulated for baby's delicate skin. Bepanthen Nappy Rash ointment helps protect against nappy rash and keeps the baby's skin hydrated whilst providing a long lasting breathable waterproof barrier. It also contains Provitamin B5 (dexpanthenol) which helps baby's sensitive skin to heal naturally. If your baby has nappy rash, Bepanthen Nappy Rash's gentle formulation quickly soothes the soreness and aids natural skin healing. Free from all colours, parabens, fragrances or preservatives, so it's the gentle choice to help treat and prevent baby's nappy rash. A clinical study1 has shown that using Bepanthen Nappy Rash to help protect baby's skin at every nappy change leads to a lower incidence of nappy rash.


1. Putet G. et al. Realites Pediatriques 2001; 63:33-38

  • Gentle enough for daily use on baby's delicate skin to help heal and prevent nappy rash.

  • Soothes, actively heals and protects from the delicate baby skin from nappy rash

  • It is free from all colours, parabens, fragrances or preservatives that may irritate baby's skin.

  • Gentle formulation quickly soothes the soreness of nappy rash

  • It contains Provitamin B5 (dexpanthenol) which helps baby's sensitive skin to heal naturally
ingredients: Contains: Purified Water, Wool Fat (Anhydrous Lanolin), Liquid Paraffin, Soft White Paraffin, Dexpanthenol (Provitamin B5), Almond Oil, White Beeswax, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearyl Alcohol, Protegin XN.

Bepanthen Antiseptic cream helps the skin to repair. Gentle enough to be used on baby skin.
It helps protect the damaged skin from infection. It soothes the damaged skin.

name: Colic & Wind
long_description:
The natural choice, Infants' Friend Colic & Wind is a pleasant tasting liquid containing natural ingredients Chamomile, Lemon Balm & Dill Seed Oil. These three ingredients have traditionally been used in western herbal medicine to relieve colic (wind/gas pain), restless sleep and symptoms of indigestion. Each box now comes with a plastic syringe for easy dosing.


Distributed Australia-wide, the Infants' Friend brand has been a household name for over 85 years, and is Australian owned and made.

Infants' Friend Colic & Wind is listed in the ARTG (AUST L 367810).

To be taken with feeds up to six times daily. Do not exceed recommended dose. If symptoms persist, talk to your healthcare professional.
  • NO ALCOHOL

  • NO SUGAR

  • NO ARTIFICIAL SWEETENERS, FLAVOURS OR COLOURS

  • SUITABLE FOR USE FROM BIRTH

  • COLIC (WIND/GAS PAIN)

  • RESTLESS SLEEP.

  • INDIGESTION SYMPTOMS.

name: Wind Drops
long_description:
Infacol has been specially formulated to relieve wind, infant colic and griping pain. The discomfort associated with colic may be caused by the build-up of small gas bubbles trapped in the baby's tummy. Infacol's active ingredient works by helping the small, trapped gas (air) bubbles join into bigger bubbles, which your baby can easily expel as wind - helping to relieve discomfort.

Can be used from birth onwards.

Infacol has a pleasant orange flavour and is free from sugar, alcohol or colourant.

Each bottle contains up to 100 doses. Infacol has a cumulative effect and therefore should be given for several days at every feed for best results.
  • Free from Sugar

  • Free from Alcohol & Colourant

  • Easy to use dropper included
ingredients: Saccharin Sodium, Hypromellose, Orange Flavour, Methyl Hydroxybenzoate, Propyl Hydroxybenzoate and Purified Water

name: Purelan Lanolin Cream
long_description:
In the first few days and weeks of frequent breastfeeding, many women experience nipple soreness and dry skin. Purelan lanolin cream gives you fast relief for sore nipples and dry skin.

It is 100% natural and safe for your baby - you do not need to remove before breastfeeding.1-4

How it works
Purelan creates a protective layer on skin's surface and is absorbed deeply by the skin where it rehydrates from within - restoring the skin's natural moisture balance.

About lanolin
Use Purelan at every feed to relieve soreness and protect your nipples. There is no need to remove Purelan before feeding.

Lanolin is a deeply hydrating, naturally occurring substance found in sheep's fleece. The lanolin in Purelan nipple cream is ethically sourced using wool from mulesing-free farms. It is highly purified and tested to the industry's highest standards (European and US Pharmacopoeia).

When absorbed into the skin, Purelan lanolin cream mimics the skin's natural ability to store moisture and can hold more than twice its weight in water - naturally helping skin's rehydration.

More ways to use Purelan
As well as soothing dry nipples or soreness during breastfeeding, Purelan can be used to moisturise a variety of dry skin areas, such as chapped lips, dry hands and cuticles, elbows and cracked heels. 

Purelan can also be used for babies and children - to protect skin during cold weather and treat dryness, wherever needed.

Purelan is available in 37 g and a handy 7 g size - ready for you to use whenever you need it through the day.

References
1Clark EW, Steel I. J Soc Cosmet Chem. 1993; 44:181-195.

2Barba Albanell C et al. Skin Pharmacol Physiol. 2018; 31:198-205

3Abou-Dakn M et al. Skin Pharmacol. Physiol. 2011; 24(1):27-35.

4Brent N et al. Arch. Pediatr. Adolesc. Med. 1998; 152(11):1077-1082.Purelan is available in 37 g and a handy 7 g size - ready for you to use whenever you need it through the day.
  • Fast relief for sore nipples and dry skin

  • Safe for your baby - no need to remove before breastfeeding

  • Effective - rich texture creates a protective layer on the skin's surface and rehydrates from within

  • 100% natural, single-ingredient lanolin. No additives, preservatives and fragrance added

  • Ultra-pure medical-grade lanolin tested to the highest safety standards, the European Pharmacopoeia and United States Pharmacopoeia standards

  • Dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin.

  • Ethically sourced from mulesing-free farms.
ingredients: 100% natural, single-ingredient lanolin. No additives, preservatives and fragrance added

The perfect treat for any occasion, Coles Finest Chocolate Hazelnut Cake combines two layers of rich and fudgy cocoa mud cake with a smooth hazelnut filling. The cake is then covered in a beautiful, dark chocolate mirror glaze before being expertly finished with hand-piped chocolate buttercream ganache and encased in crunchy roasted hazelnuts. The combination of chocolate and hazelnut is always a winner and Coles Finest Chocolate Hazelnut Cake is a decadent delight, that is sure to impress. It's made in Australia from at least 59% Australian ingredients and has no artificial colours and flavours. It's also Rainforest Alliance Certified which means it was produced using methods that support social, economic and environmental sustainability.


This indulgent double layered chocolate hazelnut cake has been hand-decorated to be a decadent delight. Rich, fudgy layers of deep cocoa mud cake with a smooth hazelnut filling, is covered with a dark chocolate mirror glaze. Expertly finished with chocolate buttercream ganache and encased with roasted hazelnuts for a delightful crunch. This cake is an edible masterpiece that celebrates chocolate craftsmanship in every bite.Dark chocolate mirror glaze, with smooth hazelnut filling and chocolate buttercream on top, encased with roasted hazelnuts.


The deep rich flavour of Coles Finest Chocolate Hazelnut Cake celebrates chocolate craftsmanship in each delicious bite. With 18 serves it's great value and will steal the show at your next event, just don't expect any leftovers.

name: Funfetti Party Cake
long_description:
Coles Celebration Funfetti Cake features four layers of fluffy rainbow coloured vanilla flavoured sponge which is all covered in a decadent, smooth vanilla flavoured frosting then topped with colourful sprinkles to dial up the fun. It's perfect for special occasions, birthdays, parties or any type of celebration.




Coles Celebration Funfetti Cake comes in a large size with 18 servings so it's ideal for larger groups and get-togethers. You can serve Coles Celebration Funfetti Cake just as it is, or add some of your own flourishes to personalise it. For birthdays, a cake topper like sparklers is a fun addition or you can place candles and marshmallows around the top of the cake for a quick and easy way to add a bit of flair. Coles Celebration Funfetti Cake also contains no artificial colours and flavours.

name: Layered Celebration Layer Cake
long_description:
Coles Celebration Chocolate and Vanilla Layer Cake features a milk chocolate sponge sandwiched between vanilla flavoured sponge which is then covered with a smooth choc frosting and topped with fun colourful sprinkles. It's perfect for special occasions, afternoon teas, and any type of celebration.


Coles Celebration Chocolate and Vanilla Layer Cake is large enough for 12 serves so it's great for feeding a crowd and has an indulgent taste. You can serve Coles Celebration Chocolate and Vanilla Layer Cake just as it is, or add some of your own flourishes to personalise it. For birthdays, a cake topper like sparklers is a fun addition or you can place candles and marshmallows around the top of the cake for a quick and easy way to add a bit of flair. Coles Celebration Chocolate and Vanilla Layer Cake also contains no artificial colours and flavours.

name: Cake 600g
long_description:
Coles Celebration Red Velvet Cake 600 g



  • Red velvet sponge with cream cheese icing

  • 10 serves

  • No artificial colours and flavours


This Coles Celebration Red Velvet Cake has been expertly crafted and features layers of decadent red velvet sponge with a silky cream cheese icing, finished with red velvet crumbs. Perfect for all types of occasions or as an afternoon sweet treat, Coles Celebration Red Velvet Cake is always a hit and guaranteed to please. And with 10 servings there's plenty to go around. Coles Celebration Red Velvet Cake is delicious on its own or you can add a bit of extra indulgence with a dollop of whipped cream or a scoop of vanilla ice cream on the side. Coles Celebration Red Velvet Cake doesn't just taste great, it's also free from artificial colours and flavours.

Indulge in the ultimate Easter treat with Ital Food's Colomba Choc & Cream Cake Gift Box. Crafted with passion and precision, our 750g cake is a symphony of chocolate and creamy goodness, designed to delight your senses and enchant your taste buds.

Savor the luxurious blend of rich chocolate and smooth cream as you indulge in each decadent slice of our Colomba cake. Whether enjoyed as a delightful dessert centerpiece for your Easter feast or shared with loved ones over coffee and conversation, our Choc & Cream Cake promises to elevate your Easter celebration to new heights.

Presented in a charming gift box adorned with elegant accents and festive flair, our Colomba cake is the perfect gift to spread joy and sweetness this Easter season. Share the love and make memories with a gift that embodies the essence of indulgence and celebration.

Treat yourself and your loved ones to the exquisite taste of Ital Food's Colomba Choc & Cream Cake Gift Box

name: Easter Biscotti Dark Choc & Orange
description: ITAL EASTER BISCOTTI DARK CHOC & ORANGE
long_description:
Biscotti are oblong-shaped, with a rustic appearance. Their golden appearance, studded with choc chips, exudes simplicity and elegance.



In homes and cafes everywhere, Ital's famous biscotti have been a favourite for many, many years. The traditional baking techniques used for over 60 years by the Angele master patisseries chefs involved all the passion, love, and respect for the specialised baking area. Ital's new soft bake Biscottini brings an all new delightful eat to this famous style of biscotti, reigniting traditional flavours with today's snacking lifestyle.



Delicious and moreish Soft Beaked Biscottini filled with the tropical flavour of orange and chocolate.



Ital's Soft Baked biscottini range are proudly manufactured here in Australia by our family of bakers for you, enjoy.



So, the next time you enjoy an Ital biscotti, Savor not only its taste but also the rich history and artistry behind this beloved Italian treat made right here in Melbourne from one of Australia's finest biscuit factories.

name: Gluten Free Mixed Seeds Bread
description: ABBOTT'S BAKERY GLUTEN FREE MIXED SEEDS BREAD
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Gluten Free Mixed Seeds Bread is a gluten free loaf with visible seeds for flavour and crunch. These soft, large slices are high in fibre, dairy free and free from artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, and they don't fall apart in your hands. With white chia, sunflower, linseed, pumpkin and poppy seeds, this Bakery Bread loaf is endorsed by Coeliac Australia. Work your topping magic and savour every last crumb.

Key Features:

- Gluten Free

- High in fibre with chia, sunflower, linseed, pumpkin and poppy seeds

- Soft, large slices that don't crumble

- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

- Crafted for full flavour, texture and aroma

  • Gluten Free

  • High in Fibre

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours and Preservatives

  • Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

  • Soft and Large Slices

long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Gluten Free Soy & Linseed Bread brings nutty crunch to your gluten free bread routine. These soft, large slices are a source of fibre, dairy free, free from artificial colours, flavours or preservatives and don't fall apart in your hands. White quinoa, kibbled soy and linseed give this Bakery Bread loaf a sweet, nutty bite. It's endorsed by Coeliac Australia and crafted for those who love topping their sandwich bread with something special.

- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

name: Gluten Free Rustic White Bread
description: ABBOTT'S BAKERY GLUTEN FREE RUSTIC WHITE BREAD
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Gluten Free Rustic White Bread features soft, large slices that are dairy free, gluten free and free from artificial colours, flavours and preservatives, that don't fall apart in your hands. Crafted for those who see the kitchen as a playground, this Bakery Bread loaf is perfect for creative sandwiches and toast. It's endorsed by Coeliac Australia, with a soft texture that makes your white bread favourites possible again.

Key Features

- Gluten Free

- Dairy free

- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

- Soft, large slices

- Creates a versatile base for toast and sandwiches

- Premium gluten free bakery option for everyday meals

  • Gluten Free

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours and Preservatives

  • Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

  • Soft and Large Slices

Soft Wholemeal + Vitamins & Minerals
Gluten free and full of goodness to fuel their play.

These soft, large slices are full of fibre plus vitamins & minerals.

Play on

Niacin B3
Critical for energy release from food.

Helps kid's growth & development.

Iron
Helps reduce tiredness & fatigue.

Necessary for a healthy immune system.

name: The One Gluten Free Smooth Wholegrain
description: TIP TOP THE ONE GLUTEN FREE SMOOTH WHOLEGRAIN
long_description:
Tip Top The One Gluten Free Smooth Wholegrain combines a smooth texture with the goodness of whole grains, minus the gluten. This Bakery Bread loaf is gluten free and endorsed by Coeliac Australia, high in fibre, a good source of iron, a source of whole grain, dairy free, FODMAP Friendly and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. It also includes Vitamin B6, Vitamin E, Niacin and Zinc, and comes in an outer bag made with 30% recycled plastic. A great everyday gluten free bread for those who want a soft, wholegrain-style slice.

Key Features

- Gluten free

- High in fibre

- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

- Dairy free

- Good source of iron

- FODMAP friendly

- Contains Vitamin B6, Vitamin E, Niacin and Zinc

- Bag made with 30% recycled plastic

  • Gluten Free -Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

  • High in Fibre

  • Contains Vitamin B6,Vitamin E, Niacin and Zinc

  • Good Source of Iron

  • Source of Whole Grains

  • Dairy Free.

  • Fodmap Friendly.

  • This outer bag is made with 30% Recycled Plastic.

name: Gluten Free Farmhouse Wholemeal Bread
description: ABBOTT'S BAKERY GLUTEN FREE FARMHOUSE WHOLEMEAL
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Gluten Free Farmhouse Wholemeal Bread delivers a hearty wholemeal experience without the gluten. These soft, large slices are high in whole grain, a source of fibre, dairy free and free from artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, and they don't fall apart in your hands. Rice bran and buckwheat create a distinctive texture and hearty flavour, while linseed meal on the crust adds a roasted nutty finish. Gluten free bread for makers who love crafting satisfying wholemeal bread sandwiches and toast.

Key Features

- Gluten free

- High fibre wholemeal loaf

- Made with rice bran and buckwheat for hearty flavour

- Soft, large slices ideal for sandwiches and toast

- 48% of your whole grain daily target

- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

  • Gluten Free

  • 48% of your whole grain daily target

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours and Preservatives

  • Soft and Large slices

name: The One Gluten Free White
description: TIP TOP THE ONE GLUTEN FREE WHITE
long_description:
Tip Top The One Gluten Free White is a super soft, tasty gluten free bread loaf that's high in fibre and contains Vitamins and Minerals. It's gluten free and endorsed by Coeliac Australia, a good source of iron, dairy free, FODMAP Friendly and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. Tip Top stands for home-grown goodness - we partner with Foodbank to share goodness with the community and use an outer bag made with 30% recycled plastic. Enjoy as everyday sandwich bread or toast, without missing white bread.

Key Features

- Gluten free

- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

- High in fibre

- Dairy free

- Good source of iron

- Contains vitamins and minerals

- Contains Vitamin B6, Vitamin E, Niacin and Zinc

- Bag made with 30% recycled plastic

  • Contains Vitamin B6, Vitamin E, Niacin and Zinc

  • Good Source of Iron

  • Dairy Free

  • Fodmap Friendly.

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavour or Preservatives.

  • ^This outer bag is made with 30% Recycled Plastic..

Topped with a blend of poppy seeds, sesame seeds, garlic and onion flakes, the "everything" seasoning will add an extra hit of flavour to every mouthful - it's the secret ingredient to elevating your homemade burgers, from breakfast through to dinner.

Best served heated and ideal for a quick and convenient lunch, just simply add your favourite fillings and enjoy.

long_description:
Coles I'm Free From Gluten Turkish Bread 190g.





  • Gluten free

  • Wheat free and dairy free

  • No artificial colours and flavours




This Coles I'm Free From Gluten Turkish Bread is the perfect accompaniment to a range of meals and snacks. It has been crafted for dietary needs and is made without wheat so it's gluten free and high in fibre but doesn't compromise on taste. Coles I'm Free From Gluten Turkish Bread is also dairy free and suitable for vegans. Best served heated and ideal for a quick and convenient lunch, just simply add your favourite fillings and enjoy.

At Helga's, we believe generosity starts with the finest ingredients, crafted by real bakers every day.
Our Soft White is a classic. Thick and soft. The way real white bread is meant to be. We use Australian wheat flour because we think it's the best in the world. We take our time to blend and rest the dough. And then we bake.
And now here it is. In your hands. We hope you love eating it as much as we loved baking it for you.

name: 5 Star Wholemeal
long_description:
NEW Wonder 5 Star Soft Wholemeal. The same great taste you know and love, with a 5 Star Health Rating.

+30% More Protein^ - More protein to support strong muscles and bones
Good Source Of Whole Grains - Each serve contributes to 40% of your daily wholegrain needs*
Excellent Source Of Fibre - Each serve contains 20% of your daily fibre needs and includes prebiotic resistant starch to support digestive health???.
No Added Nasties - No added sugar, artificial preservatives, colours or flavours.
Australian Wheat Flour - Made with Australian Wheat Flour.

*Each serve (2 slices) at Wonder 5 Star Salt Wholemeal bread contributes 40% towards the Grains & Legumes Nutrition Council 48g whole grain Daily Target Intake.
  • This delicious Wonder 5 Star Soft Wholemeal loaf contains resistant starch, a prebiotic fibre that is known to promote and nourish friendly gut bacteria when part of a healthy balanced diet.
    One serve (2 slices) of Wonder 5 Star Soft Wholemeal contains a minimum of 2g prebiotic fibre.

name: 5 Star Best Of Both
long_description:
NEW Wonder 5 Star Best of Both. The same great taste you know and love, with a 5 Star Health Rating.

Baked with a blend of 50% white and 50% wholegrain flour, delivering the goodness of whole grains with the taste and softness of white bread.
Good source of whole grains - With a blend of finely milled oats & wholegrain wheat, each serve of Wonder 5 Star Best of Both contributes 35% of your daily wholegrain needs^.
Excellent source of fibre - Each serve contains 20% of your daily fibre needs and includes prebiotic resistant starch to support digestive health#.
No Added Nasties - No added sugar, artificial preservatives, colours or flavours.
Australian Wheat Flour - Made with Australian wheat flour.
^One serve (2 slices of Wonder 5 Star Best of Both contributes 35% towards the Grains & Legumes Nutrition Coucil ??? 48g whole grain Daily Target Intake.
#This delicious loaf contains resistant starch, a prebiotic fibre that is known to promote and nourish friendly gut bacteria when part of a healthy balanced diet.
One serve (2 slices) of Wonder 5 Star Best of Both contains a minimum of 3g prebiotic fibre.
Wonder 5 Star Best of Both is an excellent source of fibre and contains 7.3g fibre/serve which is more than 20% of an adult's daily fibre requirement.
ingredients: Water, Wheat Flour (25%), Whole Grains (25%) (Wholegrain Wheat Flour, Wholegrain Oat Flour), Wheat Gluten, Modified Tapioca Starch (1413), Yeast, Wheat Fibre, Soy Flour, Vinegar, Canola Oil, Iodised Salt, Cultured Wheat Flour, Vegetale Emulsifiers (471, 472e, 481), Vitamins (Thiamin, Folic Acid), Processing Aids (Wheat)

At Helga's, we believe that great bread starts with the finest ingredients, crafted with care by real bakers every day. And when it comes to healthy eating, there should never be a trade-off between taste and nutrition.
Our High Protein Wholemeal loaf is packed with goodness, delivering 20% of your daily protein needs in just two slices. It's a simple (and delicious) way to fuel your body and support your health goals.
We hope you love every bite as much as we loved baking it for you.

Each serve (2 slices) contains 10g of protein, which contributes 20% to your daily protein requirements.

name: Mixed Grain
long_description:
Sliced mixed grain bread

30% of your whole grain daily target intake^
^One serve (2 slices) of Helga's Mixed Grain contributes 30% toward the Grains & Legumes Nutrition Council??? 48g whole grain Daily Target Intake.

At Helga's, we believe generosity starts with the finest ingredients, crafted by real bakers every day.
Our Mixed Grain is a classic. The magic is in the grains. Choosing the right ones. Getting great grainy taste and texture in every bite. We only use Australian wheat flour because we think it's the best in the world. We take our time to blend and rest the dough. And then we bake.
And now here it is. In your hands. We hope you love eating it as much as we loved baking it for you.

name: High Protein Soy Chickpea And Quinoa Bread
description: ABBOTT'S BAKERY HIGH PROTEIN SOY CHICKPEA AND QUINOA BREAD 700G
long_description:
Getting more protein into your day is easy when it tastes this good. Abbott's Bakery High Protein Soy Chickpea And Quinoa Bread is crafted with a blend of soy, chickpea and quinoa, this loaf delivers 12.1 g of protein per serving, that's 24% of your daily protein intake^, to help fuel busy days. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic, and every slice is packed with flavour and crunch. A delicious option when you want high protein bread baked for maximum deliciousness, this protein-filled loaf is truly one of a kind.

Key Features

  • Protein-rich and flavour-packed

  • 12.1 g of protein per serving

  • ^Abbott's Bakery High Protein Soy, Chickpea and Quinoa contains 24% of your daily protein requirements per serving. One serving = 2 slices (78 g)

  • This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic

  • Protein-rich, flavour-filled

  • 12.1 protein per serving

  • 24% of your daily Protein intake.

  • This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic

name: Country Grains Bread
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Country Grains Sandwich Slice Bread Loaf 800g truly goes with the grain thanks to a colourful mix of kibbled grains including purple wheat, rye, wheat, triticale and barley, finished with a sprinkle of toasted oats for extra crunch and flavour.

*One 89 g serving of Abbott's Bakery Country Grains contirbutes one-third of your 48 g Whole Grain Daily Target Intake, and it's high in fibre, made with Australian wheat and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic, so you can enjoy your loaf knowing more has been done for the planet.

Key Features

- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

- 33% of your whole grain daily target*

- Made with Australian wheat

- High in fibre

- 9.5 g of protein per serving

- This bag is made with 30% recycled plas

  • No Artificial Colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • This Bag is made with 30% recycled Plastic.

  • Made with Australian Wheat

  • High in Fibre

  • 9.5 g of Protein Per Serving

  • 33% of your Whole Grain Daily Target.

name: Sourdough White
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Sourdough White Bread turns everyday meals into something special. This classic sourdough bread has a mild sourdough flavour and scrumptious texture that suits every topping, from simple butter to gourmet sandwich fillings. The white bread loaf is dusted with flour for a rustic finish, made with Australian wheat and carries a 4 Health Star Rating. It contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, and the bag is made with 30% recycled plastic for a choice that feels as good as it tastes.

Key Features

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • 4 Health Star Rating

  • Packaged in a bag containing 30% recycled plastic

  • No Artificial Colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • This Bag is made with 30% recycled Plastic.

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • 4 Health Star Rating

  • Made with Australian Wheat

name: Harvest Seeds And Grain Bread
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Harvest Seeds and Grain Bread is packed with canola seeds, linseeds, sunflower seeds and sesame seeds for extra pop in every slice. Toast it and you'll hear the seeds crackle while the sesame seed topping adds a roasted nutty flavour. This seed and grain bread loaf is high in fibre, made with Australian wheat and provides 8.5 g of protein per serving, with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic for a loaf that tastes good and does a little more for the planet.

Key Features

name: Light Rye Bread
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Light Rye Bread Sandwich Slice Loaf gives a lighter take on traditional rye. This loaf delivers the perfect balance. We blend rye flour and rye meal with a dash of malted roasted barley flour to create a mild, light smoky flavour that's easy to enjoy every day. Soft, sliced and ideal for sandwiches, it's the rye bread you've been waiting for.

Made with Australian wheat, this bread loaf is a source of fibre with 6.7 g of protein per serving, and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic, so your favourite rye loaf works harder for you and the planet.

long_description:
Turn your everyday meal into a gourmet delight with Abbott's Bakery Sourdough Rye Bread. Enjoy the inviting aroma and scrumptious texture of this delicious sourdough loaf. We've taken the mild sourdough flavour you love, added a hint of earthiness from rye flour, and dusted the crust with wheat semolina for a beautiful golden-brown finish.

It has a 4 Health Star Rating, is made with Australian wheat and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag uses 30% recycled plastic, so your favourite sourdough rye works harder for you and the environment.

name: 5 Star White
long_description:
High fibre white sliced bread

3x More Fibre^ - An excellent source of fibre with 3X the fibre^ of regular white bread, to support good digestion.*
Added Prebiotic - Added prebiotic resistant starch to support digestive health.*
Source Of Protein - Source of protein to support bone and muscle health.
No Added Nasties - No added sugar, artificial preservatives, colours or flavours.
Australian Wheat Flour - Made with Australian Wheat Flour.
^Wonder 5 Star Soft White contains 11.6 g/100 g of fibre compared to 3.2 g/100 g in White Bread (FSANZ (2022). AFCD-2. Canberra:FSANZ)
* This delicious Wonder 5 Star Soft White loaf contains resistant starch, a prebiotic fibre that is known to promote and nourish friendly gut bacteria when part of a healthy balanced diet.
One serve (2 slices) of Wonder 5 Star Soft White contains a minimum of 4g prebiotic fibre.
Wonder 5 Star Soft White is an excellent source of fibre which supports good digestion by contributing to the benefit of being regular.

That's why we bake everyday with Aussie wheat. We partner with Foodbank to share goodness with the community. And we use more sustainable packaging whenever we can, so Australia stays beautiful for generations to come.

name: Rustic White Bread
long_description:
You can't go wrong with a classic. Especially when it's this soft. Abbott's Bakery Rustic White Bread is a soft, flavourful loaf with a subtle earthy note from rye flour and a light semolina dusting for a crusty finish. Perfect for everyday sandwich bread, toast or gourmet melts, each bread slice delivers the softness you expect from Abbott's. Made with Australian wheat, it's a source of fibre, provides 6.9 g of protein per serving and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic, adding a little extra goodness beyond the loaf itself.

Key Features
- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.
- Made with Australian wheat
- Source of fibre
- 6.9 g of protein per serving
-This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic.

  • No Artificial Colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • This Bag is made with 30% recycled Plastic.

  • Made with Australian Wheat

  • SOURCE OF FIBRE

  • 6.9 g of Protein Per Serving

name: The One White Toast Bread
description: TIP TOP THE ONE BREAD 700G:WHITE TOAST:.:700 GRAM
long_description:
This super soft and tasty loaf of Tip Top The One White Toast is sliced thicker making it the perfect option for toast. It's high in fibre, has the added benefits of essential Vitamins and Minerals and a 4.5 Health Star Rating. It's the only one you need.  

Tip Top is all about home-grown goodness. 
That's why we bake every day with Aussie wheat. We partner with Foodbank to share goodness with the community. And we use more sustainable packaging whenever we can so Australia stays beautiful for generations to come. 
 
Enjoy this loaf fresh or freeze and store it for up to 4 months at or below -15C. On thawing, best consumed immediately. 
 
^This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic using mass balance. This step is just another way we are reducing the amount of virgin plastic used in the production of your favourite bakery products.

  • Source of Protein

  • 4.5 Health Star Rating

name: Farmhouse Wholemeal Bread
long_description:
Abbott's Bakery Farmhouse Wholemeal Bread offers a hearty wholemeal flavour with a soft, satisfying texture in every slice. Crafted with bran and wheat germ for a distinctive taste, this sandwich-slice loaf is made with Australian wheat and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

*One 84 g serving of Abbott's Bakery Farmhouse Wholemeal contributes 100% of the 48 g Whole Grain Daily Target Intake, making it a smart Bakery Bread choice. Made with Australian wheat, it's high in fibre, delivers 7.5 g of protein per serving and contains no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. The bag is made with 30% recycled plastic, giving extra goodness to every slice.

Key Features

  • Wholemeal sandwich loaf made with Australian wheat

  • High in fibre

  • 7.5 g of protein per serving

  • 100% of your Whole Grain Daily Target*

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • This bag is made with 30% recycled plastic
